name: MikroTik Dual-Band 2.4/5GHz Outdoor Wi-Fi Antenna
title: MikroTik Dual-Band 2.4/5GHz Outdoor Wi-Fi Antenna
short_description: HGO-antenna-OUT, Dual-band 2.4GHz/5 GHz, RP-SMA female connectors
description: The MikroTik HGO-antenna-OUT is a high-performance, dual-band outdoor antenna designed to enhance the wireless capabilities of your network installations. With its robust construction and advanced technical features, this antenna is ideal for extending the range and improving the signal quality of wireless access points.

detailed_description.heading: Dual-Band Screw-On Outdoor Antenna
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik HGO-antenna-OUT is a high-performance, dual-band outdoor antenna designed to enhance the wireless capabilities of your network installations. With its robust construction and advanced technical features, this antenna is ideal for extending the range and improving the signal quality of wireless access points. The HGO-antenna-OUT operates on both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz frequency bands, making it highly versatile for different wireless applications. It is equipped with RP-SMA male connectors, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of devices, including MikroTik’s NetMetal ac² for a powerful Dual-Band AP setup.

This antenna provides a 3.3 dBi gain for the 2.4 GHz band, enhancing the reach and reliability of lower-frequency wireless signals. For the 5 GHz band, it offers a higher gain ranging from 5.5 to 7.1 dBi, optimizing performance for high-frequency operations that require more direct line-of-sight communications. The increased gain at 5 GHz makes it perfect for applications needing higher bandwidth and reduced interference. The screw-on design of the HGO-antenna-OUT allows for quick and easy mounting on any compatible outdoor equipment. This feature is particularly useful for network administrators looking to deploy or upgrade outdoor wireless networks with minimal downtime and technical complexity.

bought_together.name: MikroTik RPSMA Male to RPSMA Male 50cm Flex-Guide Cable
